description_long: This is a single platform shoe with a deep burgundy suede-like upper and a thick, black, high-heeled sole. The shoe features a cut-out design on the sides and a strap with a metallic buckle near the ankle, adding both style and support. The upper material appears soft and matte, while the sole is robust and slightly textured for grip. The heel is chunky and solid, providing significant elevation and stability. The interior is partially visible, showing a lighter lining material. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the shoe is in good, clean condition with no obvious signs of wear.
description: A burgundy platform shoe with a thick black heel, side cut-outs, and a buckle strap, made of suede-like material.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the rounded toe, thick platform sole, and the ankle strap with buckle.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the cut-out side design and the full height of the chunky heel.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the back of the heel, the strap, and the shoe's overall structure.
description_view_3: Rear-left view focusing on the heel's width and the back seam of the upper material.
